title: verilator does not check consistency between declaration and implementation of methods

features.name: pure virtual function overridden by non-pure virtual with missing body
features.description: Code should include a virtual class with a pure virtual function declaration, and a derived class that overrides it with a non-pure virtual function but provides no implementation body

features.name: extern function declaration with separate implementation
features.description: Code should include a class with an extern function declaration and a separate out-of-class implementation

features.name: ref parameter in class method
features.description: Code should include a class method with a ref parameter for output iteration

features.name: accessing protected member across package boundary
features.description: Code should include access to a protected bit array member (m_predecessors/m_successors) from a different package context

features.name: extern function declaration with void return but class method called in expression
features.description: Code should include an extern function declaration with void return type that is called in an expression context expecting a return value
